mean_en: a person who is the first to study and develop a particular area of knowledge, culture, etc. that other people then continue to develop; one of the first people to go to a particular area in order to live and work there
sentence: He's a pioneer in climbing, that is, the first man to reach the summit.
sentence_trans: 他是登山的先锋，即第一个到达山顶的人。
word_etyma: pion=ped脚 + eer表示人  → 用脚走路的人  → pioneer先锋
